coverage: Live: Marriott Homes & Villas (month + fortnight) and Booking.com via LATAM. Prices real; Marriott taste mostly photo-pending; Colima photo-verified.

active_offers.title: LATAM: 8 miles + 6 QP per $ (33% more miles, last call)

recommendations.title: Elegant 2BR Apartment — 30 nights
recommendations.taste_notes: Photo-verified (full gallery): modern, floor-to-ceiling windows, real balcony with leafy tree views, glass dining table with proper upholstered chairs to work from (not stools), bright airy bedroom. Strong match.
recommendations.why: Best status-aware value AND clears 30 of your 41 Titanium nights in one booking. Monthly rate ($107/nt) beats the fortnight rate ($143/nt).

recommendations.title: TOP Escandón | Bright 2BR — 30 nights
recommendations.taste_notes: Photo-verified: design-forward and modern (cognac leather, teal accents, track lighting), bright, with a dining table/work nook. In Escandón, your area. No balcony visible.
recommendations.why: Same 30 Titanium nights, in the neighbourhood you already like. Slightly pricier than the Elegant unit.

recommendations.title: Elegant 2BR Apartment — 14 nights
recommendations.taste_notes: Same (photo-verified) unit as #1, just a fortnight. Shown so you can see the month-vs-2-weeks trade-off.
recommendations.why: If a month is not available, this still earns 14 Titanium nights and triggers the 40k. But per week it is far dearer than the month, and clears fewer nights.

recommendations.title: Colima 340 by Wynwood House — 14 nights
recommendations.taste_notes: Photo-verified: modern, planted terrace, full kitchen, big light. Desk is the dining table; counter has stools.
recommendations.why: Cheapest cash and great for the LATAM climb (10,548 QP toward Platinum), but 0 Titanium nights. Only once your 75 are secured.
